summary: Health damage (chronic fatigue). Looking-Glass identifies repeated overload pattern as upstream bridge. Adjustment layer routes from depleted health state using upstream diagnosis, not just from visible symptom (fatigue).
claim_attempt: Looking-Glass identifies chronic overload as upstream bridge for the fatigue state. Adjustment layer reweights paths from the overload-depleted origin, not just the visible fatigue symptom.
stress_point: health domain upstream bridge must inform routing, not symptom alone
